test-code.description: BigInteger.valueOf(0) is a violation - use BigInteger.ZERO
BigInteger.valueOf(1) is a violation - use BigInteger.ONE
BigInteger.valueOf(10) is a violation - use BigInteger.TEN
BigInteger.valueOf(1L) with long literal is a violation
BigInteger.valueOf(2) is not a violation - no named constant for 2
BigInteger.ZERO constant is not a violation
Kotlin extension toBigInteger() is not a violation
Custom class named BigInteger is not a violation
